title: It like that
description: Private Modpack for friends. Includes magic and adventure mods. Kitchen-sink esk. Mods such as Spectrum, Malum, Bewitchment paired with Yung's adventuring plus Tectonic creates an amazing world for you and friends to explore
body:
Modpack originally intended for me and my friends. Combines an array of mods to create a world filled with magic and adventure in order to create endless fun and mischief among friends.

Using mods such as Spectrum, Malum, Bewitchment, Manic, Artifality and much more there is always content for you and your friends to explore!
